rationale: The citing paper places this work within the unobserved consideration-set literature and uses it for methodological grounding, not just as a generic background citation. In the model setup discussion, it explicitly references Van Nierop et al. (2010) to justify a key awareness-stage error-structure assumption (independence/zero correlation due instability in estimating correlation). That is a concrete role in specifying and defending the citing paper's empirical model, even though the paper is more directly built around Sovinsky Goeree (2008).
relation_description: The citing paper draws on Van Nierop et al. (2010) as methodological precedent for modeling unobserved consideration sets and for a specific identification/assumption choice in the awareness equation. The citation supports the model's setup rather than being directly extended as the primary backbone.
